---
title: "复现结果"
---

# 复现结果

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
source("scripts/setup.R")
```

## Table 1：NPP 统计分析

比较四个生物地理区在 Stadial / Interstadial 阶段的 NPP 差异。

### 数据准备

```{r}
#| label: table1-data

library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)

npp_raw <- read_excel("data/raw/Dataset-NPP.xlsx", sheet = "NPP_Regions")

npp_long <- npp_raw %>%
  filter(!is.na(Phase)) %>%
  select(Age, Phase, starts_with("NPP_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("NPP_"), names_to = "Region", values_to = "NPP") %>%
  mutate(
    Region = str_remove(Region, "^NPP_"),
    Region = recode(Region, "Submediterranean" = "Supramediterranean"),
    Period = case_when(
      str_detect(Phase, "^GS") ~ "Stadial",
      str_detect(Phase, "^GI") ~ "Interstadial",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    Region = factor(Region, levels = c("Eurosiberian", "Supramediterranean",
                                        "Mesomediterranean", "Thermomediterranean")),
    Period = factor(Period, levels = c("Stadial", "Interstadial"))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Period), !is.na(NPP))
```

### 统计汇总

```{r}
#| label: table1-summary

cv <- function(x) 100 * sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)

table1_summary <- npp_long %>%
  group_by(Region, Period) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean = round(mean(NPP, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    SD = round(sd(NPP, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    CV = round(cv(NPP), 2),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
knitr::kable(table1_summary, caption = "各生物地理区 NPP 统计汇总")
```

### Wilcoxon 秩和检验

```{r}
#| label: table1-wilcox

wilcox_results <- npp_long %>%
  group_by(Region) %>%
  summarise(
    W = wilcox.test(NPP[Period == "Interstadial"], NPP[Period == "Stadial"])$statistic,
    P = wilcox.test(NPP[Period == "Interstadial"], NPP[Period == "Stadial"])$p.value,
    .groups = "drop"
  )
knitr::kable(wilcox_results, caption = "Wilcoxon 秩和检验结果")
```

### 箱线图

```{r}
#| label: fig-table1
#| fig-cap: "各生物地理区 NPP 箱线图"
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 5

ggplot(npp_long, aes(x = Region, y = NPP, fill = Period)) +
  geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.65) +
  labs(
    title = "NPP by biogeographical region and climatic period",
    x = "Biogeographical region",
    y = expression("NPP (kg km"^-2 * " yr"^-1 * ")"),
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1), legend.position = "top")
```

## Figure 3：食草动物承载力箱线图

### NPP 时间序列（四个区域）

```{r}
#| label: fig-npp-ts
#| fig-cap: "四个生物地理区 NPP 时间序列"
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 8

npp_euro <- read.xlsx("data/raw/Dataset-NPP.xlsx", rowNames = FALSE,
                      colNames = TRUE, sheet = "NPP.Eurosiberian")
npp_sub <- read.xlsx("data/raw/Dataset-NPP.xlsx", rowNames = FALSE,
                     colNames = TRUE, sheet = "NPP.Submediterranean")
npp_meso <- read.xlsx("data/raw/Dataset-NPP.xlsx", rowNames = FALSE,
                      colNames = TRUE, sheet = "NPP.Mesomediterranean")
npp_thermo <- read.xlsx("data/raw/Dataset-NPP.xlsx", rowNames = FALSE,
                        colNames = TRUE, sheet = "NPP.Thermomediterranean")

plot_npp <- function(df, title) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Age, y = NPP, ymin = NPP - 2 * SD, ymax = NPP + 2 * SD)) +
    geom_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
    scale_x_reverse(breaks = seq(30000, 55000, 5000)) +
    geom_ribbon(alpha = 0.3) +
    ggtitle(title) +
    xlab("Age (BP)") + ylab("NPP (kg/m²/yr)") +
    ylim(0, 0.6) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12)
}

grid.arrange(
  plot_npp(npp_euro, "Eurosiberian"),
  plot_npp(npp_sub, "SubMediterranean"),
  plot_npp(npp_meso, "Mesomediterranean"),
  plot_npp(npp_thermo, "Thermomediterranean"),
  nrow = 4
)
```

### 食草动物承载力估算

```{r}
#| label: fig3
#| fig-cap: "四大区域不同体型食草动物承载力箱线图"
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 10

# 定义四个区域的参数
regions <- list(
  list(name = "Eurosiberian", npp_sheet = "NPP.Eurosiberian",
       fauna_sheet = "Fauna.EuroSiberian", macro = "EuroSiberian",
       periods = list(
         list(period = "GI-13", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GI9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GI9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GI9"),
         list(period = "GS-13", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GI9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GI9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GI9"),
         list(period = "GI-12", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GI9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GI9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GI9"),
         list(period = "GS-12", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GI9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GI9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GI9"),
         list(period = "GI-11", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GI9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GI9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GI9"),
         list(period = "GS-11", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GI9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GI9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GI9"),
         list(period = "GI-10", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GI9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GI9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GI9"),
         list(period = "GS-10", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GI9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GI9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GI9"),
         list(period = "GI-9",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GI9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GI9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GI9"),
         list(period = "GS-9",  bm_col = "BM_GS9_GI7", species_col = "Species_GS9_GI7", sc_col = "SC_GS9_GI7"),
         list(period = "GI-8",  bm_col = "BM_GS9_GI7", species_col = "Species_GS9_GI7", sc_col = "SC_GS9_GI7"),
         list(period = "GS-8",  bm_col = "BM_GS9_GI7", species_col = "Species_GS9_GI7", sc_col = "SC_GS9_GI7"),
         list(period = "GI-7",  bm_col = "BM_GS9_GI7", species_col = "Species_GS9_GI7", sc_col = "SC_GS9_GI7"),
         list(period = "GS-7",  bm_col = "BM_GS7_GS5", species_col = "Species_GS7_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GS7_GS5"),
         list(period = "GI-6",  bm_col = "BM_GS7_GS5", species_col = "Species_GS7_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GS7_GS5"),
         list(period = "GS-6",  bm_col = "BM_GS7_GS5", species_col = "Species_GS7_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GS7_GS5"),
         list(period = "GI-5",  bm_col = "BM_GS7_GS5", species_col = "Species_GS7_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GS7_GS5"),
         list(period = "GS-5",  bm_col = "BM_GS7_GS5", species_col = "Species_GS7_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GS7_GS5")
       )),
  list(name = "SubMediterranean", npp_sheet = "NPP.Submediterranean",
       fauna_sheet = "Fauna.SubMediterranean", macro = "Mediterranean",
       periods = list(
         list(period = "GI-13", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS7", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS7", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS7"),
         list(period = "GS-13", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS7", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS7", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS7"),
         list(period = "GI-12", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS7", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS7", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS7"),
         list(period = "GS-12", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS7", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS7", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS7"),
         list(period = "GI-11", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS7", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS7", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS7"),
         list(period = "GS-11", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS7", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS7", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS7"),
         list(period = "GI-10", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS7", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS7", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS7"),
         list(period = "GS-10", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS7", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS7", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS7"),
         list(period = "GI-9",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS7", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS7", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS7"),
         list(period = "GS-9",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS7", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS7", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS7"),
         list(period = "GI-8",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS7", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS7", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS7"),
         list(period = "GS-8",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS7", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS7", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS7"),
         list(period = "GI-7",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS7", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS7", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS7"),
         list(period = "GS-7",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS7", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS7", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS7"),
         list(period = "GI-6",  bm_col = "BM_GI6_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI6_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI6_GS5"),
         list(period = "GS-6",  bm_col = "BM_GI6_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI6_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI6_GS5"),
         list(period = "GI-5",  bm_col = "BM_GI6_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI6_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI6_GS5"),
         list(period = "GS-5",  bm_col = "BM_GI6_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI6_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI6_GS5")
       )),
  list(name = "MesoMediterranean", npp_sheet = "NPP.Mesomediterranean",
       fauna_sheet = "Fauna.MesoMediterranean", macro = "Mediterranean",
       periods = list(
         list(period = "GI-13", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS9"),
         list(period = "GS-13", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS9"),
         list(period = "GI-12", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS9"),
         list(period = "GS-12", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS9"),
         list(period = "GI-11", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS9"),
         list(period = "GS-11", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS9"),
         list(period = "GI-10", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS9"),
         list(period = "GS-10", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS9"),
         list(period = "GI-9",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS9"),
         list(period = "GS-9",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS9", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS9", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS9"),
         list(period = "GI-8",  bm_col = "BM_GI8_GI7", species_col = "Species_GI8_GI7", sc_col = "SC_GI8_GI7"),
         list(period = "GS-8",  bm_col = "BM_GI8_GI7", species_col = "Species_GI8_GI7", sc_col = "SC_GI8_GI7"),
         list(period = "GI-7",  bm_col = "BM_GI8_GI7", species_col = "Species_GI8_GI7", sc_col = "SC_GI8_GI7"),
         list(period = "GS-7",  bm_col = "BM_GS7_GS5", species_col = "Species_GS7_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GS7_GS5"),
         list(period = "GI-6",  bm_col = "BM_GS7_GS5", species_col = "Species_GS7_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GS7_GS5"),
         list(period = "GS-6",  bm_col = "BM_GS7_GS5", species_col = "Species_GS7_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GS7_GS5"),
         list(period = "GI-5",  bm_col = "BM_GS7_GS5", species_col = "Species_GS7_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GS7_GS5"),
         list(period = "GS-5",  bm_col = "BM_GS7_GS5", species_col = "Species_GS7_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GS7_GS5")
       )),
  list(name = "ThermoMediterranean", npp_sheet = "NPP.Thermomediterranean",
       fauna_sheet = "Fauna.ThermoMediterranean", macro = "Mediterranean",
       periods = list(
         list(period = "GI-13", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5"),
         list(period = "GS-13", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5"),
         list(period = "GI-12", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5"),
         list(period = "GS-12", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5"),
         list(period = "GI-11", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5"),
         list(period = "GS-11", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5"),
         list(period = "GI-10", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5"),
         list(period = "GS-10", bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5"),
         list(period = "GI-9",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5"),
         list(period = "GS-9",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5"),
         list(period = "GI-8",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5"),
         list(period = "GS-8",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5"),
         list(period = "GI-7",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5"),
         list(period = "GS-7",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5"),
         list(period = "GI-6",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5"),
         list(period = "GS-6",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5"),
         list(period = "GI-5",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5"),
         list(period = "GS-5",  bm_col = "BM_GI13_GS5", species_col = "Species_GI13_GS5", sc_col = "SC_GI13_GS5")
       ))
)

# 处理所有区域
all_biomass <- list()
for (r in regions) {
  result <- process_region(r$npp_sheet, r$fauna_sheet, r$periods)
  result$biomass$Region <- r$name
  result$biomass$MacroRegion <- r$macro
  all_biomass[[r$name]] <- result$biomass
}
Herbivore_Biomass <- do.call(rbind, all_biomass)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig3-plot
#| fig-cap: "四大区域不同体型食草动物承载力箱线图"
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 10

region_order <- c("Eurosiberian", "SubMediterranean", "MesoMediterranean", "ThermoMediterranean")

make_boxplot <- function(df, ycol, ylab) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(Region, levels = region_order), y = .data[[ycol]], fill = SI)) +
    stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", position = position_dodge(0.9), width = 0.5) +
    geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "BrBG") +
    xlab("") + ylab(ylab) + labs(fill = "") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12)
}

grid.arrange(
  make_boxplot(Herbivore_Biomass, "Biomass_Large_Herbivores_Mean", "Large herbivores"),
  make_boxplot(Herbivore_Biomass, "Biomass_MediumLarge_Herbivores_Mean", "Medium-large herbivores"),
  make_boxplot(Herbivore_Biomass, "Biomass_MediumSize_Herbivores_Mean", "Medium herbivores"),
  make_boxplot(Herbivore_Biomass, "Biomass_SmallSize_Herbivores_Mean", "Small herbivores"),
  nrow = 4
)
```

## Figure 5：食草动物承载力堆积柱状图

```{r}
#| label: fig5
#| fig-cap: "四大区域食草动物承载力时序变化"
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 10

# 转换为长格式
size_cols <- c("Biomass_SmallSize_Herbivores_Mean", "Biomass_MediumSize_Herbivores_Mean",
               "Biomass_MediumLarge_Herbivores_Mean", "Biomass_Large_Herbivores_Mean")
size_labels <- c("Small", "Medium", "Medium-Large", "Large")

Dataset_Biomass <- do.call(rbind, lapply(1:4, function(i) {
  data.frame(
    Biomass = Herbivore_Biomass[[size_cols[i]]],
    Phase = Herbivore_Biomass$Phase,
    Region = Herbivore_Biomass$Region,
    Size = size_labels[i]
  )
}))

phase_order <- c("GI-13", "GS-13", "GI-12", "GS-12", "GI-11", "GS-11",
                 "GI-10", "GS-10", "GI-9", "GS-9", "GI-8", "GS-8",
                 "GI-7", "GS-7", "GI-6", "GS-6", "GI-5", "GS-5")

make_barplot <- function(region_name) {
  df <- subset(Dataset_Biomass, Region == region_name)
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Phase, y = Biomass,
                 fill = factor(Size, levels = rev(size_labels)))) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
    scale_x_discrete(limits = phase_order) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 950)) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "BrBG", name = "Size") +
    labs(title = region_name, x = "Stadial/Interstadial", y = "Biomass (kg/km²)") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 7))
}

grid.arrange(
  make_barplot("Eurosiberian"),
  make_barplot("SubMediterranean"),
  make_barplot("MesoMediterranean"),
  make_barplot("ThermoMediterranean"),
  nrow = 4
)
```
